Ask me about my career...
Conversation Skill Gen
Turn raw support transcripts into a complete AI skill spec, ready for engineering to build on.
01 Upload
Drop in a CSV or DOCX of customer support transcripts.
02 Analyze
Intents are identified, scored by automation potential, and ranked by impact.
03 Generate
A full skill spec is produced: responses, escalation rules, data to fetch, how to use it, and API shape for engineering.
Example
A customer asks why their transfer is delayed. The spec tells the AI what data to look up, how to interpret it, and what to say. Once engineering unlocks the required data points, the AI resolves it on its own, no escalation needed, saving the customer time and reducing support volume.
Need help taking it further? Martin is available for consulting to help your team integrate, build, and ship. Get in touch!
Analyzing transcripts...
This may take up to 30 seconds depending on how many transcripts were uploaded.
Analysis complete

Project
Chipotle Messenger & ABC Webview
Role
UI & UX Designer
Status
Live on FB Messenger
Client
LivePerson
Challenge
Designing a complex food order customization UI that seamlessly integrates with the Facebook Messenger framework without losing the benefits of chat.
Solution
A full ordering UI webview triggered by call-to-action buttons within Messenger. Webviews allow fully customizable pages loaded within the chat window to compensate for platform limitations.
Scalability
The template was designed to translate easily to other restaurant chains across Facebook Messenger, Apple Business Chat and any platform that supports webviews.
Features designed
Full menu ordering Order customization Order checkout Order scheduling Account creation Guest account Account login
